query_normalized: kairos: a native world model stack for physical ai computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the domain of "Physical AI" and "World Models," which are the core components of the user's research question. Although it is a broad survey rather than a specific implementation of the "Kairos" stack, it provides the essential literature review context regarding the alignment of cyber and physical spaces, embodied agents, and world model architectures that a researcher in this specific niche would be
